svg.text: The Voltage Selection sheet takes the
voltage levels as input and selects
one of them to become VDD - the
power level for the Target MCU and
whole power circuitry is in this
TX and RX provide a UART
All pins from the MCU are routed
to these Pin Headers, except for:
- PA1 and PA2, used for crystal.
- PD1 and PD7, used for flashing.
- PD5 and PD6, used for UART-link
must be flashed when used for the first
time with an external probe, through J2:
From then onwards, the USB signals
give access to the on-board probe.
